title: Shantam Sapphire
subtitle: Your New Beginning
desc: A prestigious residential development offering unparalleled luxury and state-of-the-art amenities.
heroDescription: We are thrilled to introduce Shantam Sapphire, our premium redevelopment project located in the prime area of Ambawadi, Ahmedabad. Designed with modern architecture, comfort, and sustainability in mind, Shantam Sapphire offers luxurious living in the heart of the city.
subDescription: Experience a home where security, elegance, and convenience come together. Join us in shaping the future of urban living at Shantam Sapphire.
tagline: Luxury 3 BHK apartments in the heart of Ambawadi, Ahmedabad. Experience spacious interiors, modern amenities, and a prime location crafted for your comfort and lifestyle.
businessTagline: Business is a game of having advanced outlook and guts to outpace rivals. You can achieve the same by giving an address that can convey your Class with superiority. Shantam Sapphire with its global outlook leads your business to a striking edge.

specifications.label: Flooring
specifications.detail: Vitrified tiles flooring in all area. Paved parking area.

specifications.label: Finishing
specifications.detail: Inside single coat mala plaster with white cement putty. Outside double coat sandface plaster with acrylic paint.

specifications.label: Electric
specifications.detail: Single phase concealed copper electric wiring. Sufficient electric points with modular switches. One telephone point in each shop & office.

termsAndConditions: This brochure is not to be treated as part of legal document and is for easy display of the project only.
All measurements are super buildup and subject to change as required.
The right to change in plan and any structure reserves with the organizer.
No External changes will be allowed or entertained.
Internal changes mandate to the organizer approval and be charged extra.
All legal charges, service to the organizer approval and will be borne by the member.
Any extra charges in between due to change in Government policy or rates will be informed and are to be borne by the member.
Maintenance deposit shall be borne by the member.
Irregular payment will lead to cancellation of booking.
GEB, Stamp duty, Registration, service tax, VAT or any other government taxes/Charges will be borne by members.
Any changes directed by architect/organizer will be binding to all the members.

process.title: Idea & Start
process.desc: We assess your site, understand your vision, and set the groundwork. Through in-depth consultations, we establish a clear roadmap.

process.title: Design & Create
process.desc: Our architects translate ideas into detailed 3D blueprints focusing on aesthetic value, structural safety, and all necessary permits.

process.title: Build & Finish
process.desc: With precision engineering and premium materials, our team constructs your project exactly as planned with a seamless handover.

title: Shantam-9
subtitle: Everything at just One Destination... a Distinct Identity
desc: A fine commercial space development for emerging business owners and professionals.
heroDescription: Shantam-9 is located in one of the most happening commercial avenues in the heart of Himmatnagar. Strategically located on one of the busiest crossroads on the Motipura circle, Shantam-9 gives your business all the advantages of a perfect location.
subDescription: It has reputed hotels and business centers in close vicinity and at the same time, it connects you easily with other hubs. A new age business hub designed exclusively for the Next Generation.
tagline: A fine commercial space development for Emerging Business owners and professionals. Presenting a new age business hub designed exclusively for Next Generation.
businessTagline: Business is a game of having advanced outlook and guts to outpace rivals. You can achieve the same by giving an address that can convey your Class with superiority. Shantam-9 with its global outlook leads your business to a striking edge.

salientFeatures.text: Ample visitor parking space on Ground Floor
Building plan approved as commercial complex
All units having full road frontage with adequate signage space
Well designed foyers at every level
MCB & ELCB switches in all units

title: Shantam-11
subtitle: A Fusion of aesthetic beauty and craftsmanship
location: Nr. Kotak Mahindra Bank, Shamlaji Road, Modasa
desc: The most advance Business Park of Modasa, where corporate vision meets success.
heroDescription: With Years of experience Shantam group, Ahmedabad is coming up with Shantam-11, a pleasant business park that has best quality, planning, dedication, vision and innovation at Modasa — a fastest growing city of Aravalli district Gujarat.
subDescription: Shantam-11 is the one and only elegant business park in the district where you can find most advance elevation, enrich your business with status and bring prosperity.
tagline: A Fusion of aesthetic beauty and craftsmanship. The Spectrum of Lifestyle and luxury.
businessTagline: Shantam – 11 a place where you get all state of the art facility which grow your business. A modern design ground + 3 story construction with spacious design which gives elegant looks.

title: Shilp Embark
subtitle: ... a Ideal address for Better Future
location: Nr. Fatepura Circle, Mehsana Bypass Highway, Mehsana
desc: Bringing to you, Shilp Embark, Mehsana's first venture of Business embark spaces, Well equipped with all essentials for growing business. Be the beneficiary with a junction of Showrooms, Offices & Shops.
heroDescription: Mehsana's Modern Business Embark. Trendy design with an eye-catching elevation.
subDescription: Embark on a new chapter for your business at this landmark commercial destination.
tagline: A Junction of Showrooms, Offices & Shops.
businessTagline: Trendy design with an eye-catching elevation. Be proud of a beautiful Night View.
